Hey, this is a tiny little hack that will increase people's belief that you are who you say you are and that you do what you say you can do. Get one of those little photo albums that you can like slide photos into and fill it up with before and afters. I mean like make it like a fat book of before and afters. If you don't have a fat book of before and afters, I have gone through the, I guess it's just not that hard. I went through and found a couple of the Dropbox links from like years ago where we had a bunch of before and afters. I stopped taking them because like we had a million of them and we had a bunch of TV screens but I like the physical book too so we hit both. But no matter what someone does, as soon as they come in, after they sign in, you hand them the book and say hey, why don't you look through that. It's a whole bunch of people who have done the program that you're, you know, that we're about to sign you up for. And so it just gets them really excited. It's just so much social proof like social proof, social proof, social proof, social proof. That then when you tell them 87% of people hit the goal, they will believe you. So their belief levels will be a lot higher. But this is something that we call pre-framing, which seems pretty intuitive. But do it. So if you want to get extra credit or you're having trouble closing or you just want to be an awesome badass closer, do this and it will make you more money. So I put the links in there. Do me a favor, don't mess with anything. And just copy and paste them into a separate folder for yourself. And then, and yeah, enjoy.
